Functions for ARM I-Cache, D-Cache, FPU, interrupts, and thread privilege management.


## Files
- **[cache_arm.c](cache_arm.c.md)**: Functions for enabling, disabling, and managing ARM I-Cache and D-Cache operations.
- **[fpu_arm.c](fpu_arm.c.md)**: Manages FPU register stacking for Cortex M4 by resetting the FPCA bit during context switches.
- **[interrupts_arm.c](interrupts_arm.c.md)**: Checks if ARM MCU interrupts are enabled by examining the PRIMASK register.
- **[privilege_arm.c](privilege_arm.c.md)**: Functions to manage ARM MCU thread privilege levels, including setting and checking privilege status.
